parameters.subject: Day 1: Getting started with {{ $json.body.tenant_name }}
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.body.user_name }},

Welcome to {{ $json.body.tenant_name }}! Here's your day 1 guide:

1. Complete your profile at https://app.{{ $env.DOMAIN }}/settings
2. Invite your first team member
3. Explore the API docs at https://docs.{{ $env.DOMAIN }}

Need help? Just reply to this email.

Best,
The Team

parameters.subject: Day 2: Power features in {{ $json.body.tenant_name }}
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.body.user_name }},

Here are 3 power features you should try today:

1. Set up your first webhook integration
2. Create an API key for programmatic access
3. Customize your workspace settings

Dashboard: https://app.{{ $env.DOMAIN }}/dashboard

Best,
The Team

parameters.subject: Day 3: Ready to upgrade {{ $json.body.tenant_name }}?
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.body.user_name }},

You've been using {{ $json.body.tenant_name }} for 3 days now! Here's what upgrading unlocks:

- Starter plan: 10x API limits, team collaboration
- Pro plan: SSO, audit logs, custom domains
- Enterprise: Unlimited everything + priority support

Upgrade: https://billing.{{ $env.DOMAIN }}

Happy building!
The Team
